'''G'ai Solem''' was one of a number of cities located on the planet [[Solem]], and was known as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stronghold.

Early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Imperial Governor [[Malvander Bren]] chose G'ai Solem as his seat of power. The city, along with the planet itself, was brutally subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. However, resistance to the Empire's rule was strong in the city, and rioting broke out outside Malvander's palace after the capture of rebel leader [[Yolan Bren]].
